title: Sunday roast chicken
sources: Mrs Beeton, Book of Household Management (1861) — roast fowl recipes — Project Gutenberg #10136.
Eliza Acton, Modern Cookery for Private Families (1845) — roast poultry chapter.
notes: The British Sunday-lunch anchor recipe. Buttered breast, lemon and thyme in the cavity, bird on a bed of onion/carrot/celery, pan gravy from the resting juices. Keep the trimmings (potatoes, stuffing, bread sauce) referenced rather than reproduced — those are their own recipes.
